name: Catgirl Clan
description:
The Demi-Girl Clans Series, #1

TW: Nothing intentional, but NPCs can be random.

You, a human, have been isekai’d into a world of demi-humans, directly into the den of a clan of catgirls! They’ve never heard of humans, or males for that matter (if you happen to be one). They’re definitely curious about you and your lack of animal features. The world is prehistoric in comparison to ours.

Since this one did so well, I’m going to try to add more. They’ll largely follow in sequence, and they will probably be longer between entries than my other bot series have tended to be (figure probably a few weeks between new bots in the series). As long as interest remains, I’ll try to come up with new scenarios (and new clans).

Note: Other than a few mentions, no actual characters have been defined. All characters are NPCs and may well do odd and triggering things. Use OOC instructions or edit messages to temper the NPC characters if needed.

Check out the alternate MalePOV Catgirl Clan, where demi users are allowed.

Image from AI

Next in the series: Wolf-girl Clan.
creator: KitKat73
